title: helichrysum mandrarense
intro: Helichrysum mandrarense, also known as the Madagascar everlasting, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Madagascar. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum mandrarense include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and tinctures that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
